title: MasterClass Clear Capstan Copper-Effect Pepper Mill, 14.5 cm (5.75'')
features: High-quality pepper mill with trendy copper-effect finish - a striking statement for the kitchen or dining room
With flavour-enhancing carbon steel mechanism - strips and slices peppercorns to unlock more flavour
Transparent acrylic body lets you see how much pepper you have left - it even comes with 9 g of peppercorns
Matching 14.5 cm (5¾") salt mill available - search for product code MCSNPCOPSALT
description: From the manufacturer Cook with Confidence KitchenCraft's premium brand with over 600 deluxe kitchen tools, gadgets, knives and accessories including its acclaimed bakeware collection. Master Class Clear Capstan Copper-Effect Pepper Mill (14.5 cm) Treat your table to a striking centrepiece with the Master Class Clear Capstan Copper-Effect Pepper Mill. The body is made of virtually unbreakable acrylic, while the base and cap are finished with a lovely copper effect – a look that’s on-trend but timeless too. Besides its chic metallic look, this pepper grinder boasts a strong carbon steel grinding mechanism that’s designed to extract more flavour from peppercorns. In other words, it’s durable, attractive, and can make your delicious food taste even better. Copper – The Must-Have Metallic The copper style is a real must-have in the home, thanks to its lustrous look that’s uniquely glamorous and rustic. It’s thanks to these unique properties that the copper look is so trendy, yet so timeless – at the same time as evoking modern allure, it brings to mind traditional homeware, rural domesticity and even a hint of the industrial. This copper-effect pepper grinder works beautifully in the kitchen or dining room. On its own (or paired with its matching salt mill) it acts as an instant, striking centrepiece for a table or worktop. Or you can match it with other copper accessories to create a unified look, infused with copper’s unique glamour. Unlock the flavour of your food. This pepper mill is fitted with a carbon steel grinding mechanism that strips and slices peppercorns for maximum flavour release. So as well as looking great, this grinder helps unlock the rich flavours of your food with powerful seasoning. Carbon steel is a tough and durable material, so you can expect years of performance from this pepper mill. Clear body and engraved caps for easy identification. The main body of the mill is made up of a tough, transparent acrylic window. This means you can see at a glance which seasoning you’re putting on your food – as well as checking how much pepper is left in the mill. The mill even has a metallic cap engraved with the letter ‘P’ – so there’s no excuse for mix-ups. Looking for a matching salt mill? This pepper mill looks great on its own, but it works even better as part of a pair. Why not take full advantage of its striking copper style, and combine this mill with its matching salt grinder (MCSNPCOPSALT)?
